summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 P0 bug fixes: 1) Paywall currency (SEK), 2) Feature preferences toggles on Settings page, 3) Hatching module back button. All fixes verified through code review - UI testing limited due to Google OAuth requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Settings.tsx (lines 323-389): Now correctly uses featurePrefs.preferences?.show_flock_management instead of featurePrefs.flock_management - matches API response structure
✅ Statistics.tsx (lines 368-503): Graphs tab ('Grafer') exists with proper structure: graphs-section class, chart-container class, ResponsiveContainer from recharts, LineChart and BarChart components
✅ Paywall.tsx (lines 91-152): handlePurchase() no longer calls RevenueCatUI.presentPaywall() - always uses custom paywall with hardcoded SEK prices (19 kr/month, 149 kr/year)
✅ Hatching.tsx (lines 235-238, 270-272): Back button added for both premium and non-premium users
test_credentials: None required - OAuth login needed for full UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified via code review. Full UI testing requires Google OAuth login. Web app at https://mobile-first-43.preview.emergentagent.com/api/web/ loads correctly showing login page. API endpoint /api/feature-preferences returns correct structure with preferences object containing show_flock_management etc.

Settings Page - Feature Toggles Fix.details: Settings.tsx now uses featurePrefs.preferences?.show_flock_management pattern matching API response {is_premium, can_customize, preferences: {show_flock_management, ...}}

Statistics Page - Graphs Tab.details: Graphs tab exists (line 300-305), contains LineChart for egg production and BarChart for economy with proper ResponsiveContainer and chart-container structure

Mobile Paywall - SEK Currency Fix.details: RevenueCatUI.presentPaywall() is not called in handlePurchase(). Prices hardcoded as MONTHLY_PRICE='19 kr' and YEARLY_PRICE='149 kr'

Hatching Module - Back Button.details: Back button added at lines 235-238 (non-premium view) and 270-272 (premium view header)

API /api/feature-preferences.response_structure: {is_premium: bool, can_customize: bool, preferences: {show_flock_management: bool, show_health_log: bool, ...}}

Web Frontend Load.details: Web app loads at /api/web/ with Google login button 'Kom igång gratis med Google'

api_tests_performed.response_sample: {is_premium: false, subscription_id: null, plan: null, expires_at: null}
